signals.signal_title: Project backlog $9.3B — AI data center gas demand
signals.signal_description: Project backlog surged from $1.4B to $9.3B driven by AI data center natural gas demand. $1.7B Trident Pipeline (Texas), $3.5B Copper State Connector (Arizona), $1.7B Mississippi Crossing sanctioned. $3.4B capex planned 2026.

signals.signal_title: Palantir Foundry + Xage zero-trust OT security deployed
signals.signal_description: Multi-year Palantir Foundry deployment for pipeline analytics and operational efficiency. Xage Security zero-trust OT cybersecurity architecture deployed across pipeline network.

FY2025 record Adjusted EBITDA $8.39B (+6% YoY), revenue $16.94B. Record annual net income and EBITDA. $3.4B capex planned 2026. CEO described current opportunity set as most robust in company history.

enrichment_notes: Largest natural gas pipeline network in North America — ~66,000 miles, transports ~40% of US natural gas. Houston HQ (STOLA, no channel mismatch). FY2025 record revenue $16.94B, Adjusted EBITDA $8.39B (+6% YoY). ~10,933 employees. Technology leadership: Michael Pitta is VP/CAO overseeing HR, IT and Administration — not a standalone CIO. CFO actively collaborates with Pitta on GenAI strategy (per IMD case study). Palantir Foundry deployed for pipeline analytics. Xage Security zero-trust OT cybersecurity deployed. $9.3B project backlog — largest in company history (AI data center gas demand). No MSP confirmed. No M365 evidence — ms_standardized=false. ai_maturity=11 — Palantir + Xage deployed, CFO GenAI engagement, below ≥15 threshold. WWT angle: OT/SCADA for massive pipeline expansion, cybersecurity (Xage = zero-trust entry point), data center connectivity infrastructure.
